reason=Records show the callback identity check passed for the vendor controller and the destination token matches the active bank token and release queue ticket for the invoice; this aligns with policy POL-CALL-DEST and supports proceeding now (B16-04-SRC-02, B16-04-SRC-03, B16-04-SRC-04, B16-04-SRC-05).
